questions.question: Explain Next.js Developer Troubleshooting Part 7C and its primary use case in Next.js Developer.
questions.answer: Next.js Developer Troubleshooting Part 7C provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with Next.js Developer Troubleshooting Part 7C?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the Next.js Developer runtime optimize Next.js Developer Troubleshooting Part 7C under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
